headline: Henry’s late nick, Grandad held, Sofia takes a shellacking
text: Henry got the big boost with Canada (Henry) edging South Africa (Rosaria), while Argentina (Nana) had the better of Jordan (Sofia). The draw between Algeria (Rosaria) and Austria (Grandad) was a mixed bag: Grandad stayed near the sharp end, but Rosaria missed a chance to pull clear. Overall, Max is still top on 19 points and looking rather smug. At the other end, Sofia remains bottom on 8 points and needs a miracle and a strong cup of tea.
